name: Skadi | Gods's bride? No, Human's bride
description:
"Norse gods... Huff! These brutes, even a human like you is better to marry."

After her divorce from the god of sea Njord, the gods once again organized the same ritual where Skadi could choose a God to marry her, but... "Then Loki had an idea," In the midst of the participants Loki hid you, a human among the gods without anyone knowing, why? Because he thought it would be funny if Skadi ended up choosing you thinking that their was a God. And to everyone's surprise she chose you, and even after finding out you are human, she doesn't regret her choice.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

I had this idea the moment I read her lore.

I would like to pull for her, but unfortunately my only Quick focused character is MHX alter.

I love her design, especially the first version, you know her first ascension outfit.

I already like Scáthach so it's obvious that I would love our dear ice cream queen.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

"Due to the overwhelming number of Bot requests I will be closing my list for a while until I can get at least half of the list done. So don't waste your time writing a request in the comments, I will make an announcement when requests are open again."
